title: Adventurer Jeff Ayliffe talks about living life like a wild parachute jump
description: GEORGE NEWS - Join the Wilderness Ratepayers...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Join the Wilderness Ratepayers and Residents Association (WRRA) on Wednesday 13 November for a delightful talk by Jeff Ayliffe, a former professional skydiver, radio presenter and full-time free spirit.

The theme of Ayliffe’s talk is ‘Chasing the winds of adventure: life lessons from a free spirit’.


> His journey through life is like a wild parachute jump - unexpected twists, thrilling descents, and maybe a few unexpected landings!


With his heart firmly on his sleeve (and occasionally in the clouds), he's spent his days searching not for financial security but for the good in people and a deep connection with nature.

Let’s just say, if there were a manual on living responsibly, Ayliffe's probably used it as a paper airplane.

Join the WRRA to hear his hilarious stories and discover the lessons he's learned from chasing the winds of adventure - one jump at a time.

The meeting will start at 18:00 for 18:30 at the Fairy Knowe Hotel, 1 Dumbleton Road, Wilderness.

Jeff Ayliffe

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
